title: Golden Brown Spanish Eggs Skillet
description: A flexitarian friendly Spanish dish featuring jammy eggs, cheese pull, and green salsa, perfect for a brunch mood.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large oven safe skillet over medium high heat.
Add the diced onion and bell pepper and cook until they start to soften.
Add the smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
Pour in the green salsa and stir to combine, then bring the mixture to a simmer.
Make 6 wells in the salsa mixture and crack an egg into each well.
Transfer the skillet to the oven and bake at 375 degrees until the eggs are cooked to desired doneness.
Remove the skillet from the oven and sprinkle the shredded cheese over the top.
Return the skillet to the oven and bake until the cheese is melted and golden brown.
Remove the skillet from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes before serving.
